user.loginUser: SELECT * FROM security.users WHERE (users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1) AND users_password = $2;
user.verifyUser: SELECT * FROM security.users WHERE (users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1);
user.registerGeneralUser: INSERT INTO security.users (users_name, users_email, users_password) VALUES ($1, $2, $3);
user.registerUser: INSERT INTO security.users (users_name, users_email, users_password, fk_profile_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4);
user.updatePassword: UPDATE security.users SET users_password = $1 WHERE (users_email = $2 OR users_name = $2);
user.deleteUser: DELETE FROM security.users WHERE users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1;
user.getUser: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email FROM security.users AS u WHERE u.users_name = $1 OR u.users_email = $1;
user.updateValue: UPDATE security.users SET users_{{var}} = $1 WHERE users_name = $2 OR users_email=$2;
user.getAllUsers: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email, p.profile_name FROM security.users u JOIN security.profile p ON u.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id

tx.permsTxQuery: SELECT mp.fk_transaction_id AS tx_id, mp.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM security.method_permission AS mp;
tx.txQuery: SELECT t.transaction_id, m.method_name, o.object_name FROM security.transaction AS t INNER JOIN security.method AS m ON t.fk_method_id = m.method_id INNER JOIN security.object AS o ON m.fk_object_id = o.object_id;
tx.addTxPerms: INSERT INTO security.method_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_transaction_id) SELECT p.profile_id, t.transaction_id FROM security.profile p, security.transaction t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM security.method_permission mp WHERE mp.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND mp.fk_transaction_id = t.transaction_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND t.transaction_id = $2;
tx.deleteTxPerms: DELETE FROM security.method_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_transaction_id = $2;

option.optionsQuery: SELECT op.option_id, op.option_name, op.option_function, op.option_params, op.option_async, op.option_generic, co.component_name FROM security.option AS op INNER JOIN security.component AS co On op.fk_component_id = co.component_id;
option.permsOptQuery: SELECT op.fk_option_id AS option_id, op.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM security.option_permission as op;
option.addOptPerms: INSERT INTO security.option_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_option_id) SELECT p.profile_id, o.option_id FROM security.profile p, security.option o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM security.option_permission op WHERE op.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND op.fk_option_id = o.option_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND o.option_id = $2;
option.deleteOptPerms: DELETE FROM security.option_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_option_id = $2;

profile.getProfiles: SELECT profile_id AS id, profile_name AS name FROM security.profile;

whereIsThisUsed?.verifyDuplicate: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email FROM security.users AS u WHERE u.users_name = $1 OR u.users_email = $2;
